mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0511_01-02#Sql001 */ SBP_NO , TITLE , STATUS , SUGGESTION , FILE1 AS ATTACH_FILE1 , FILE2 AS ATTACH_FILE2 , FILE3 AS ATTACH_FILE3 , TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGISTER_DATE FROM SUG_BOX_PERSONAL WHERE SBP_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo})

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0511_01-02#Sql002 */ SBPA_NO AS ANSWER_NO , ANSWER AS ANSWER_CONTENTS , TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ANSWER_REGISTER_DATE , TO_CHAR(ANSWER_UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ANSWER_UPDATE_DATE FROM SUG_BOX_PERSONAL_A WHERE SBP_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo}) ORDER BY SBPA_NO ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0511_01-02#Sql003 */ CORDYS.SUG_BOX_PERSONAL_A SET ANSWER = #{req.answerContents} , ANSWER_UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , ANSWER_UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId} , UNREAD_FLG = '1' , UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId} WHERE SBP_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo}) AND SBPA_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.answerNo})
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0511_01-02#Sql004 */ INTO CORDYS.SUG_BOX_PERSONAL_A ( SBP_NO , SBPA_NO , ANSWER , ANSWER_UPDATE_TIME , ANSWER_UPDATE_USER , UNREAD_FLG , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER ) SELECT TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo}) AS SBP_NO , NVL(MAX(SBPA_NO)+1, 1) AS SBPA_NO , #{req.answerContents} AS ANSWER , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AS ANSWER_UPDATE_TIME , #{req.userId} AS ANSWER_UPDATE_USER , '1' AS UNREAD_FLG , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AS CREATE_TIME , #{req.userId} AS CREATE_USER , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE AS UPDATE_TIME , #{req.userId} AS UPDATE_USER FROM CORDYS.SUG_BOX_PERSONAL_A WHERE SBP_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0511_01-02#Sql005 */ CORDYS.SUG_BOX_PERSONAL SET STATUS = #{req.status} , ANS_UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.userId} WHERE SBP_NO = TO_NUMBER(#{req.sbpNo})
